CREATE TABLE tuples_test (a Tuple(Int32, Int32), b Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT tupleMinus((5, 10), (5, 5)) AS result FROM tuples_test WHERE a.1 > 0;
CREATE TABLE t1 AS SELECT tupleMinus((x, x + 2), (2, 1)) AS difference FROM (SELECT 1 AS x);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT tupleMinus(b, a) AS difference FROM tuples_test;
WITH ((3, 4) AS t1, (1, 2) AS t2) SELECT tupleMinus(t1, t2) AS result;
WITH (SELECT a FROM tuples_test WHERE a.1 = 5) AS subquery SELECT tupleMinus((1, 2), (2, 3)) FROM subquery;
SELECT tupleMinus((10, 20), (5, 15)) as result, sum(tupleMinus(a, b)) AS total FROM tuples_test;
SELECT t1.a, t2.b, tupleMinus(t1.a, t2.b) AS diff FROM tuples_test AS t1 JOIN tuples_test AS t2 ON t1.a.1 < t2.b.1;
